groups.requirements: Unify Score viewer and Conductor frontend into a single React app under crates/sdd/packages/@score/. (1) Move @cclab/{ui,spec-viewer,pipeline} → crates/sdd/packages/@score/{ui,spec-viewer,pipeline}, rename to @score/*. (2) Create @score/core with SddDataSource adapter interface (LocalDataSource for filesystem, RemoteDataSource for REST API). (3) Create @score/app as unified React SPA with React Router, DataSource via Context. (4) Replace crates/sdd/src/ui/viewer/assets/ vanilla JS with @score/app build output, keep axum server + include_str!() embedding. (5) Update Conductor FE to import @score/app as sub-routes.
questions: Should @score/app use React Router or a lighter client router?
Should the axum API routes be expanded to match the full SddDataSource interface, or keep the existing /api/files/* pattern?
Should the React build be pre-built and committed, or built at cargo build time via build.rs?
